name: Spousal RRSP, T4PS, and Benefit Repayment
description: Complete David Alarie's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return (including his spouse Sophie's information) using StudioTax 2024. Save the completed return as 'david_alarie.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\. Tax documents and a scenario outline are located in C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\alarie\.

metadata.data_source: CRA T4PS, T4E Slip Formats 2024; CRA Guide T4040 (RRSPs and Other Registered Plans for Retirement)
